description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 18 hrs 38 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 6 mins. His time was spent mostly in Java, along with Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. The activity data shows work across 5 projects, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
